title: General Caster Formula casting to Linkage Column

posts.author: PShamet (Phil Shamet)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am curious if it is possible to cast a formula to a linkage column. Essentially, I have 3 boards that need to be connected:

  1. Project Roadmap
  2. RAID Log
  3. Change Management Log

The Project Roadmap hosts items whose ‘names’ are the title of our projects. We use this board to track all projects in our portfolio. The RAID Log is a board to log risks, actions, issues, and decisions associated with the projects on the Project Roadmap. Within the RAID Log, we link the Project Roadmap item to the RAID Log item. Similarly, the Change Management Log is a board to log changes associated with projects on the Project Roadmap. Within the Change Management Log, we link the Project Roadmap item to the Change Management Log item.

I have an automation in place when the status for an item on the Change Management Log changes to “Approved,” it creates an item on the RAID Log and links the two items. When the item is created on the RAID Log, I want to automatically link the new RAID Log item with the Project Roadmap item that the Change Management Log item was also connected to. I am having trouble casting a formula into the linkage column on the RAID Log and I am hoping you can help. Here is the current architecture:

Project Roadmap

  • When item is created, {item’s Name} is cast into “Text_Field_Column_PR ”

Change Management Log

  • User selects item from “Project Roadmap” board in “Linkage_CML” column to link associated Project Roadmap item to Change Management Log item
  • Mirror column shows “Text_Field_Column_PR”
  • When status changes to “Approved,” create item on “RAID Log” board and link items on both boards in “RAID_Log_Linkage” column
  • When “RAID_Log_Linkage” changes, cast mirrored “Text_Field_Column_PR” to “Text_Field_Column_CML”
  • When “Text_Field_Column_CML” changes, cast “Text_Field_Column_CML” to mirrored column “Text_Field_Column_RL” (this is a text column on RAID Log that is mirrored onto the Change Management Log)

RAID Log

  • Text column “Text_Field_Column_RL” is populated with Project Roadmap item name as explained above
  • Linkage column “Linkage_RL” exists on this board to connect associated Project Roadmap items to RAID Log item, similar to the Change Management Log protocol
  • When “Text_Field_Column_RL” changes, cast “Text_Field_Column_RL” to “Linkage_RL”
    • This is where I am experiencing issues. I have tried both formulas to cast to a column and cast to a mirrored column, but neither works to populate the linkage column.
    • The “Text_Field_Column_RL” is the same as the item names in the Project Roadmap, so it should be able to cast a link the item within the linkage column.
